chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-433 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Fresh Case 1.For orders on office objections. 2.Fororder on CMA 3772/2023 3.For orders on CMA 3773/2023 4.For orders on CMA 1818/2023 5.For hearing of main case 22-02-2024 None present for the petitioners. ***** None present for the petitioners. On the last date of hearing, counsel for petitioners was directed to satisfy the Court about the laches involved in this petition, as they have challenged the recruitment process of 2013 in this petition filed after ten years in the year 2022. Today, they have chosen to remain absent without any intimation. Hence, this petition along with listed applications is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
